history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the right of my position. The path forward is free ('.') but the next cell to the right after moving forward is lava ('L'). To approach the goal safely, I should move forward first to get closer, then reconsider my next move.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
After moving forward, I am now facing a lava cell directly in front and another lava cell to my right. Moving forward or to the right would be dangerous. The goal is to the right from my current position, so I need to turn right first to face the goal and avoid the lava in front of me.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right towards a wall '#', so I cannot move forward. The goal G is to my left and slightly forward, behind a wall separating me from it. There is lava around, so I need to find a safe path avoiding the walls and lava. Currently, turning left will face me towards the open floor cells, possibly allowing me to navigate around obstacles.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The current observation shows I am facing an unsafe lava cell directly ahead and another to the right. The goal is located to my right beyond the lava. Since I cannot move forward safely and the goal is to the right, I should turn right to face the goal direction and plan my next move accordingly.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right towards a wall '#', so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal G, which is to my left, I need to turn left to face that direction. This will allow me to move towards the goal when there's a free path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing forward where there are two lava cells blocking the path. The goal is located to my right beyond the lava. To avoid the lava and reach the goal, I should turn right to head towards the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is to my left and slightly forward. There is a wall immediately in front of me and a lava cell to my right. Turning left will orient me towards the goal and open a path without lava blocking it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The immediate path forward is blocked by lava cells, making moving forward unsafe. The goal is visible to the right beyond the lava, so the best action is to turn right to face in that direction and approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing forward, but there is a wall in front of me. The goal G is visible to my left, so I should turn left to face the goal and plan to move towards it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The path ahead is blocked by lava cells, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is to the right. I should turn right to face the goal and proceed safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing forward into a wall. The goal G is to my left. I will turn left to face the goal and plan to move toward it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Again, the lava cells block the path forward. The goal is to the right. I will turn right to face the goal and attempt to move toward it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing a wall directly ahead. The goal G is visible to my left side at one cell to the left. I will turn left to face the direction of the goal so I can move toward it safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The lava cells are directly ahead and to the right, which are unsafe. The goal G is visible to the right but blocked by lava. I cannot move forward or right due to lava. I will turn left to explore a safer direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing a wall directly in front of me, and the surrounding cells are walls as well. I cannot move forward. To find an open path, I need to turn. I will turn left and check for a safe direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
